---
title: 'Ford Flex'
date: '2012-11-18T05:28:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4307243913621051407'
blogger_filename: '/2012/11/ford-flex.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Car'
  - '2nd Car'
---

I saw MANY car models and makes at the Texas State Fair. I am now VERY impressed with the Ford Flex. Not only does it meet all my specifications, but the company is inspiring me in their following the Good to Great model of "Core Concept". Their core concept is not to make a little of everything, but rather to:<br />
<br />
<a href="http://corporate.ford.com/innovation/innovation-detail/fs-global-vehicle-product-development">http://corporate.ford.com/innovation/innovation-detail/fs-global-vehicle-product-development</a><br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>They get the best technology, performance and driving experience at an affordable cost, and itâ€™s all wrapped up in a very attractive styling package</i></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>Creating a One Ford Global Product Development System
</i></blockquote>
I really enjoy that this company took the bold move to avoid Government Money and strike out on their own. This showed real leadership by good business minded people, unlike Chevy and Chrysler which are still struggling to figure out who they are.&nbsp;Ford will be growing and getting better with time.<br />
<br />
I'm now looking at the Ford Flex as my dream car. Fully loaded it has all of the features (room, ride, etc) and the experiences (touch everything, tech interactivity, etc).<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ford-flex-2-6211ad557c72.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="480" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ford-flex-2-1fb05b0d66ba.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ford-flex-3-926a676bc9fe.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="480" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ford-flex-3-5d085193e3e5.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ford-flex-741f363a92be.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="480" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ford-flex-a84c761683f5.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
